title: Quick Access
description: Easily access crafting tables, enderchests, shulkers, etc... just by right clicking in your inventory.
body:
# Quick Access

A simple **server-sided** mod that allows for convenient access to:
- crafting tables
- enderchests
- shulker boxes
- loom
- cartography tables
- stonecutters
- grindstones
- smithing tables
  
...by **right clicking** in inventories or when holding the item in hand.

You can disable the right click functionality for each item and also whether to play sound for shulker/enderchests in ```/config/quickaccess.properties```. The config options should be self explanatory.


## Showcase

Holding the item while right clicking:

![showcase1](https://github.com/tricube3/quick-access/blob/main/gif/showcase1.gif?raw=true)

Right clicking the item in a GUI:

![showcase2](https://github.com/tricube3/quick-access/blob/main/gif/showcase2.gif?raw=true)
